description: PR6 — greedy-only placement. Multi-section multi-slot scenario that exercises the greedy round-robin placer long enough that perf_counter measures a non-zero ms, without triggering any post-greedy stage. Expect only greedy.ms and greedy.iterations > 0; all other stage keys zero.
notes: Four sections × two cohort pairs across four non-conflicting slots. Greedy places all four without stalling; post-greedy stages stay idle because there is no same-cohort clump to relax and no room-crowding to repair.
greedy.iterations should be >= 4 (one per section attempted). greedy.ms measured via time.perf_counter so even fast placements register non-zero.
